AddEipGroupCount.id: ID of the shared bandwidth package
AddEipGroupCount.clientToken: Idempotency token, see [clientToken](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
AddEipGroupCount.eipAddCount: Number of IPv4 EIPs to add to the shared bandwidth package. Must be greater than 0; total public IPs can include at most n entries where n*5Mbps is less than the total shared bandwidth.
AddEipGroupCount.eipv6AddCount: Number of IPv6 EIPs to add to the shared bandwidth package. Must be greater than 0; total count is quota-controlled, default maximum is 256.
